title: "Memory with non-constant width or size!" message, when a function which returns a constant value is used
code_blocks:
$ yosys -Q -p "read_verilog examples/vivado/functions_constant.v"

-- Running command `read_verilog examples/vivado/functions_constant.v' --

1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend: examples/vivado/functions_constant.v
Parsing Verilog input from `examples/vivado/functions_constant.v' to AST representation.
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\functions_constant'.
examples/vivado/functions_constant.v:21: ERROR: Memory `\ram' with non-constant width or size!
